title: Leji context index
description: Generated map of the context layer. Never hand-maintained; regenerate on change.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema, for editor validation and tooling.

schemaVersion.description: The Leji spec line this artifact was written against, e.g. "1.0".

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the index was generated.

generator.description: The tool that generated this index.

name.description: Name of the generating tool, e.g. "leji".

rootPath.description: Context root the entries are relative to; mirrors the manifest's rootPath.

entries.description: One entry per indexed document in the context layer.

id.description: Stable identifier; renames and moves update the path, never the id.

title.description: Human-readable title, from the document's first heading or frontmatter.

category.description: Which content category this document belongs to.

summary.description: One-line summary of the document, for routing and navigation.

lastModified.description: ISO 8601 date the document last changed, from version control where available.

contentHash.description: Hash of the document's contents, used to detect drift and stable moves.

reviewAfter.description: ISO 8601 date after which the document should be reviewed for staleness.

links.description: Optional outbound references from this document.
